'''âl-n-r''' ('''kalanar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbrage|umbrage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbrage|umbrage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-n-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalanar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilanar|thilanar]] || [[word:jilanar|jilanar]] || [[word:shilanar|shilanar]] || [[word:kilanar|kilanar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulanar|thuthulanar]] || [[word:jujulanar|jujulanar]] || [[word:shushulanar|shushulanar]] || [[word:kukulanar|kukulanar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulanar|thulanar]] || [[word:julanar|julanar]] || [[word:shulanar|shulanar]] || [[word:kulanar|kulanar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulanar|thulanar]] || [[word:julanar|julanar]] || [[word:shulanar|shulanar]] || [[word:kulanar|kulanar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelanar|thelanar]] || [[word:jelanar|jelanar]] || [[word:shelanar|shelanar]] || [[word:kelanar|kelanar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholanar|thotholanar]] || [[word:jojolanar|jojolanar]] || [[word:shosholanar|shosholanar]] || [[word:kokolanar|kokolanar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholanar|tholanar]] || [[word:jolanar|jolanar]] || [[word:sholanar|sholanar]] || [[word:kolanar|kolanar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholanar|tholanar]] || [[word:jolanar|jolanar]] || [[word:sholanar|sholanar]] || [[word:kolanar|kolanar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlanar|thĂŠlanar]] || [[word:jĂŠlanar|jĂŠlanar]] || [[word:shĂŠlanar|shĂŠlanar]] || [[word:kĂŠlanar|kĂŠlanar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalanar|thathalanar]] || [[word:jajalanar|jajalanar]] || [[word:shashalanar|shashalanar]] || [[word:kakalanar|kakalanar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalanar|thalanar]] || [[word:jalanar|jalanar]] || [[word:shalanar|shalanar]] || [[word:kalanar|kalanar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalanar|thalanar]] || [[word:jalanar|jalanar]] || [[word:shalanar|shalanar]] || [[word:kalanar|kalanar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalanar|shalanar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalanar|goshalanar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalanar|gokishalanar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalanarnĂŒ|shalanarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalanarnknĂŒ|goshalanarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanarnĂŒ|gokishalanarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalanarshĂ«|shalanarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalanarnkshĂ«|goshalanarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalanarshĂ«|gokishalanarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanaro|shalanaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanarnkro|goshalanarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanaro|gokishalanaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanarmu|shalanarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanarnkmu|goshalanarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanarmu|gokishalanarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalanarsher|shalanarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalanarnksher|goshalanarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalanarsher|gokishalanarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalanarng|shalanarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalanarnkng|goshalanarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalanarng|gokishalanarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalanarya|shalanarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalanarnkya|goshalanarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalanarya|gokishalanarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalanaryam|shalanaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalanarnkyam|goshalanarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalanaryam|gokishalanaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanarnĂŒshĂ«|shalanarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalanarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalanarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanarnĂŒro|shalanarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanarnknĂŒro|goshalanarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanarnĂŒro|gokishalanarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanarnĂŒmu|shalanarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanarnknĂŒmu|goshalanarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanarnĂŒmu|gokishalanarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanarshĂ«nĂŒ|shalanarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalanarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalanarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanarshĂ«ro|shalanarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanarnkshĂ«ro|goshalanarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanarshĂ«ro|gokishalanarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanarshĂ«mu|shalanarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanarnkshĂ«mu|goshalanarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanarshĂ«mu|gokishalanarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanaronĂŒ|shalanaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanarnkronĂŒ|goshalanarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanaronĂŒ|gokishalanaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanaroshĂ«|shalanaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanarnkroshĂ«|goshalanarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanaroshĂ«|gokishalanaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanaromu|shalanaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanarnkromu|goshalanarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanaromu|gokishalanaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanarmunĂŒ|shalanarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanarnkmunĂŒ|goshalanarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanarmunĂŒ|gokishalanarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanarmushĂ«|shalanarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanarnkmushĂ«|goshalanarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanarmushĂ«|gokishalanarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanarmuro|shalanarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanarnkmuro|goshalanarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanarmuro|gokishalanarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
